general_feedback: All three @return descriptions accurately reflect the code behavior. `pickLowerBound` correctly describes returning the more restrictive (max) of the two lower bounds, with `None` when both are unbounded. `pickUpperBound` mirrors this for upper bounds (min). `isInsideViewBounds` precisely captures the inclusive lower / exclusive upper semantics, and correctly notes that each bound is only enforced 'if any'. Style is consistent with the existing @param documentation, uses backticks for code references, and starts with lowercase.
